infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Assistive Vision uses the camera to capture images for AI scene description and text recognition.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Assistive Vision uses the microphone so you can record voice messages for the assistant.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Assistive Vision to use your camera so you can scan images.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Assistive Vision to use your microphone for camera and voice features.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Assistive Vision to choose images for text recognition.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Assistive Vision to record voice messages for the assistant.
